property.name: salesTransactionItems
property.label: Sales Transaction Items (Input)
property.description: Collection of SalesTransactionItem records received from the Data Manager.

property.name: transactionRecord
property.label: Transaction Record (Input)
property.description: Transaction record received from the Data Manager.

property.name: attributeCategories
property.label: Attribute Categories (Input)
property.description: Collection of AttributeCategory records received from the Data Manager.

property.name: optionGroups
property.label: Option Groups (Input)
property.description: Collection of OptionGroup records received from the Data Manager.

property.name: summary
property.label: Transaction Summary (Input)
property.description: Pricing summary received from the Data Manager.

property.name: Out_salesTransactionItems
property.label: Out: Sales Transaction Items
property.description: Collection of SalesTransactionItem records exposed as a flow output variable.

property.name: Out_transactionRecord
property.label: Out: Transaction Record
property.description: Transaction record exposed as a flow output variable.

property.name: Out_attributeCategories
property.label: Out: Attribute Categories
property.description: Collection of AttributeCategory records exposed as a flow output variable.

property.name: Out_optionGroups
property.label: Out: Option Groups
property.description: Collection of OptionGroup records exposed as a flow output variable.

property.name: Out_summary
property.label: Out: Transaction Summary
property.description: Pricing summary exposed as a flow output variable.
